mapper.sql: id, sku, description_cn, model, unit, unit_price_usd, currency, single_weight, packing_net_weight, packing_gross_weight, packing_cbm, box_length, box_width, box_height, hs_code, hs_description, origin_country, destination_country, source_location, exemption, created_at, updated_at

p.id, p.sku, p.description_cn, p.model, p.unit, p.unit_price_usd, p.currency, p.single_weight, p.packing_net_weight, p.packing_gross_weight, p.packing_cbm, p.box_length, p.box_width, p.box_height, p.hs_code, p.hs_description, p.origin_country, p.destination_country, p.source_location, p.exemption, p.created_at, p.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM customs_products_list WHERE sku LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description_cn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY CASE WHEN sku = #{keyword} THEN 0 WHEN sku LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, sku LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM customs_products_list WHERE sku = #{sku} LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM customs_products_list WHERE
(sku = #{p.sku} AND IFNULL(source_location, '') = IFNULL(#{p.sourceLocation}, ''))

SELECT DISTINCT od.sku FROM overseas_stock_order_detail od LEFT JOIN customs_products_list p ON p.sku COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = od.sku COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci WHERE od.overseas_order_no IN #{order} AND od.sku IS NOT NULL AND od.sku != '' AND p.sku IS NULL ORDER BY od.sku

SELECT DISTINCT b.sku FROM amz_fba_shipment_box b LEFT JOIN customs_products_list p ON p.sku COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = b.sku COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci WHERE b.shipment_id IN #{shipment} AND b.sku IS NOT NULL AND b.sku != '' AND p.sku IS NULL ORDER BY b.sku
mapper.sql: sku, description_cn, model, unit, unit_price_usd, currency, single_weight, packing_net_weight, packing_gross_weight, packing_cbm, box_length, box_width, box_height, hs_code, hs_description, origin_country, destination_country, source_location, exemption, is_tax
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO customs_products_list () VALUES
()
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE description_cn = VALUES(description_cn), model = VALUES(model), unit = VALUES(unit), unit_price_usd = VALUES(unit_price_usd), currency = VALUES(currency), single_weight = VALUES(single_weight), packing_net_weight = VALUES(packing_net_weight), packing_gross_weight = VALUES(packing_gross_weight), packing_cbm = VALUES(packing_cbm), box_length = VALUES(box_length), box_width = VALUES(box_width), box_height = VALUES(box_height), hs_code = VALUES(hs_code), hs_description = VALUES(hs_description), origin_country = VALUES(origin_country), destination_country = VALUES(destination_country), source_location = VALUES(source_location), exemption = VALUES(exemption), is_tax = VALUES(is_tax), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO customs_products_list (sku, source_location, description_cn, model, unit, unit_price_usd, currency, single_weight, packing_net_weight, packing_gross_weight, packing_cbm, box_length, box_width, box_height, origin_country, destination_country, hs_code, hs_description, exemption, is_tax) SELECT od.sku, IF(il.product_code IS NOT NULL, REPLACE(REPLACE( IF(REPLACE(il.product_code, '\n', '') REGEXP '[（(]', SUBSTRING_INDEX(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(il.product_code, '\n', ''), '(', '（'), ')', '）'), '（', -1), ''), '）', ''), ')', ''), ''), IFNULL(il.product_name, ''), '无型号', IFNULL(il.customs_unit, ''), IF(il.tax_included_price IS NOT NULL AND il.tax_included_price REGEXP '^[0-9.]+(/[0-9.]+)*$', CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(il.tax_included_price, '/', -1) AS DECIMAL(10,2)), 0), IFNULL(NULLIF(od.tariffs_currency_unit, ''), 'USD'), IFNULL(ROUND(od.calc_net_weight / NULLIF(od.calc_product_qty, 0), 4), 0), od.calc_net_weight, od.calc_gross_weight, od.calc_cbm, od.cg_box_length, od.cg_box_width, od.cg_box_height, '中国', IFNULL(w.name, ''), IFNULL(REGEXP_SUBSTR(TRIM(IFNULL(il.declaration_elements, '')), '^[0-9]+'), ''), TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(IFNULL(il.declaration_elements, '')), '^[0-9]+[[:space:]]*', '')), '照章', IFNULL(po.is_tax, 0) FROM ( SELECT calc.*, IFNULL(calc.total_box_weight, IFNULL(calc.cg_box_weight, 0) * calc.calc_box_count) AS calc_gross_weight, GREATEST(IFNULL(calc.total_box_weight, IFNULL(calc.cg_box_weight, 0) * calc.calc_box_count) - calc.calc_box_count * 0.5, 0) AS calc_net_weight, GREATEST(IFNULL(calc.quantity_in_case, 1) * calc.calc_box_count, 1) AS calc_product_qty, IFNULL(calc.total_box_volume, IFNULL(calc.box_cbm, 0) * calc.calc_box_count) AS calc_cbm FROM ( SELECT od.*, GREATEST( IFNULL( NULLIF(od.package_num, 0), IF(od.total_box_weight IS NOT NULL AND od.cg_box_weight IS NOT NULL AND od.cg_box_weight > 0, ROUND(od.total_box_weight / od.cg_box_weight), 1) ), 1 ) AS calc_box_count FROM overseas_stock_order_detail od ) calc ) od LEFT JOIN customs_inventory_list il ON REPLACE(od.product_code, 'JMH-', '') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = REPLACE(il.sku, 'JMH', '') LEFT JOIN warehouse w ON od.r_wid = w.wid LEFT JOIN purchase_order po ON od.sku COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = po.item_sku WHERE od.product_code LIKE 'JMH-%' ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE source_location = VALUES(source_location), description_cn = VALUES(description_cn), unit_price_usd = VALUES(unit_price_usd), model = VALUES(model), unit = VALUES(unit), currency = VALUES(currency), single_weight = VALUES(single_weight), packing_net_weight = VALUES(packing_net_weight), packing_gross_weight = VALUES(packing_gross_weight), packing_cbm = VALUES(packing_cbm), box_length = VALUES(box_length), box_width = VALUES(box_width), box_height = VALUES(box_height), destination_country = VALUES(destination_country), exemption = VALUES(exemption), is_tax = VALUES(is_tax), updated_at = NOW()

INSERT IGNORE INTO customs_products_list (sku, source_location, description_cn, model, unit, unit_price_usd, currency, single_weight, packing_net_weight, packing_gross_weight, packing_cbm, box_length, box_width, box_height, origin_country, destination_country, hs_code, hs_description, exemption, is_tax) SELECT src.sku, src.source_location, IFNULL(NULLIF(src.product_name, ''), ''), '无型号', IFNULL(src.unit, ''), IF(src.tax_included_price IS NOT NULL AND src.tax_included_price REGEXP '^[0-9.]+(/[0-9.]+)*$', CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(src.tax_included_price, '/', -1) AS DECIMAL(10,2)), 0), 'USD', IFNULL(ROUND(src.group_net_weight / NULLIF(src.group_qty, 0), 4), 0), ROUND(src.group_net_weight / NULLIF(src.group_qty, 0) * src.product_qty, 4), ROUND(src.group_gross_weight / NULLIF(src.group_qty, 0) * src.product_qty, 4), ROUND(src.group_cbm / NULLIF(src.group_qty, 0) * src.product_qty, 6), src.box_length, src.box_width, src.box_height, '中国', src.country_name, IFNULL(REGEXP_SUBSTR(TRIM(IFNULL(src.declaration_elements, '')), '^[0-9]+'), ''), TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(IFNULL(src.declaration_elements, '')), '^[0-9]+[[:space:]]*', '')), '照章', 0 FROM ( SELECT weighted.sku, COALESCE(NULLIF(il.product_name, ''), NULLIF(weighted.product_name, '')) AS product_name, il.customs_unit AS unit, il.tax_included_price, il.declaration_elements, IF(il.product_code IS NOT NULL, REPLACE(REPLACE( IF(REPLACE(il.product_code, '\n', '') REGEXP '[（(]', SUBSTRING_INDEX(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(il.product_code, '\n', ''), '(', '（'), ')', '）'), '（', -1), ''), '）', ''), ')', ''), '') AS source_location, weighted.product_qty, weighted.group_qty, GREATEST(weighted.group_gross_weight - weighted.group_box_count * 0.5, 0) AS group_net_weight, weighted.group_gross_weight, weighted.group_cbm, weighted.box_length, weighted.box_width, weighted.box_height, CASE UPPER(IFNULL(s.ship_to_country_code, '')) WHEN 'DE' THEN '德国' WHEN 'US' THEN '美国' WHEN 'GB' THEN '英国' WHEN 'UK' THEN '英国' WHEN 'ES' THEN '西班牙' WHEN 'CN' THEN '中国' WHEN 'FR' THEN '法国' WHEN 'PL' THEN '波兰' WHEN 'IT' THEN '意大利' ELSE IFNULL(s.ship_to_country_code, '') END AS country_name FROM ( SELECT base.*, SUM(base.product_qty) OVER ( PARTITION BY base.shipment_id, base.box_num, base.box_weight, base.box_length_text, base.box_width_text, base.box_height_text ) AS group_qty, MAX(base.gross_weight) OVER ( PARTITION BY base.shipment_id, base.box_num, base.box_weight, base.box_length_text, base.box_width_text, base.box_height_text ) AS group_gross_weight, MAX(base.box_count) OVER ( PARTITION BY base.shipment_id, base.box_num, base.box_weight, base.box_length_text, base.box_width_text, base.box_height_text ) AS group_box_count, MAX(base.cbm) OVER ( PARTITION BY base.shipment_id, base.box_num, base.box_weight, base.box_length_text, base.box_width_text, base.box_height_text ) AS group_cbm FROM ( SELECT b.id, b.sid, b.shipment_id, b.box_type, b.box_weight, b.box_dimensions_unit, b.box_weight_unit, b.box_num, b.msku, b.sku, b.product_name, b.fulfillment_network_sku, b.quantity_in_case, b.box_length AS box_length_text, b.box_width AS box_width_text, b.box_height AS box_height_text, GREATEST(IFNULL(b.box_num, 1), 1) AS box_count, IF(b.quantity_in_case IS NOT NULL AND b.quantity_in_case REGEXP '^[0-9.]+$', CAST(b.quantity_in_case AS DECIMAL(12,4)), 1) * GREATEST(IFNULL(b.box_num, 1), 1) AS product_qty, IF(b.box_weight IS NOT NULL AND b.box_weight REGEXP '^[0-9.]+$', CAST(b.box_weight AS DECIMAL(12,4)) * IF(UPPER(IFNULL(b.box_weight_unit, 'KG')) IN ('LB', 'LBS'), 0.45359237, 1) * GREATEST(IFNULL(b.box_num, 1), 1), 0) AS gross_weight, IF(b.box_length IS NOT NULL AND b.box_length REGEXP '^[0-9.]+$', CAST(b.box_length AS DECIMAL(12,4)) * IF(UPPER(IFNULL(b.box_dimensions_unit, 'CM')) IN ('IN', 'INCH'), 2.54, 1), NULL) AS box_length, IF(b.box_width IS NOT NULL AND b.box_width REGEXP '^[0-9.]+$', CAST(b.box_width AS DECIMAL(12,4)) * IF(UPPER(IFNULL(b.box_dimensions_unit, 'CM')) IN ('IN', 'INCH'), 2.54, 1), NULL) AS box_width, IF(b.box_height IS NOT NULL AND b.box_height REGEXP '^[0-9.]+$', CAST(b.box_height AS DECIMAL(12,4)) * IF(UPPER(IFNULL(b.box_dimensions_unit, 'CM')) IN ('IN', 'INCH'), 2.54, 1), NULL) AS box_height, CASE WHEN b.box_volume IS NOT NULL AND b.box_volume REGEXP '^[0-9.]+$' THEN CAST(b.box_volume AS DECIMAL(12,6)) WHEN b.box_length IS NOT NULL AND b.box_length REGEXP '^[0-9.]+$' AND b.box_width IS NOT NULL AND b.box_width REGEXP '^[0-9.]+$' AND b.box_height IS NOT NULL AND b.box_height REGEXP '^[0-9.]+$' THEN ROUND( CAST(b.box_length AS DECIMAL(12,4)) * CAST(b.box_width AS DECIMAL(12,4)) * CAST(b.box_height AS DECIMAL(12,4)) * POW(IF(UPPER(IFNULL(b.box_dimensions_unit, 'CM')) IN ('IN', 'INCH'), 2.54, 1), 3) / 1000000 * GREATEST(IFNULL(b.box_num, 1), 1), 6 ) ELSE NULL END AS cbm FROM amz_fba_shipment_box b ) base ) weighted INNER JOIN ( SELECT sku, MIN(id) AS id FROM amz_fba_shipment_box WHERE sku IS NOT NULL AND sku != '' GROUP BY sku ) pick ON weighted.id = pick.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT il1.* FROM customs_inventory_list il1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT sku, MIN(id) AS id FROM customs_inventory_list WHERE sku IS NOT NULL AND sku != '' GROUP BY sku ) il_pick ON il1.id = il_pick.id ) il ON weighted.sku COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = il.sku COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci LEFT JOIN amz_fba_shipment s ON weighted.shipment_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = s.shipment_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci ) src WHERE src.sku IS NOT NULL AND src.sku != ''
